basics.name: Kwok Yuen Fan
basics.label: Assistant Professor of Economics and Finance
basics.summary: Assistant Professor of Economics and Finance at The Hang Seng University of Hong Kong (HSUHK). Research uses Corporate Finance as a lens to examine how firms balance economic gains with social welfare, focusing on sustainability, real estate, and corporate finance.

work.name: The Hang Seng University of Hong Kong (HSUHK)
work.position: Assistant Professor of Economics and Finance
